name: Eagles of World War 2
short_description: A fantasy based arcade shooter set in World War 2 with frantic bullet hell shooter style gameplay and a bullet time slo motion mechanic. Take on the enemy forces solo or with a friend either in local co-op or online with STEAM's remote play together.
detailed_description:
About the game



Eagles of World War 2 is a fantasy based arcade shooter set in World War 2.
The game offers frantic bullet hell shooter style gameplay and incorporates a bullet time mechanic which can be triggered when you are getting over run with enemy fire.

Take on the enemy forces solo or with a friend either in local co-op or online with STEAM's remote play together.
Slow time to avoid bullets and deal damage to the enemy with pin point accuracy.

Collect a multitude of temporary power ups throughout your mission and permenently upgrade your fighter to your liking at the end of each mission to help keep you in the fight and taking down your enemy.

Set a high score on the world leaderboard and prove your shoot em up skills across 5 varying difficulty levels.
Take on the very accessible easy mode or play the normal difficulty and unlock further difficulty challenges with each play through.

This is a hard shoot em up harkening back to shmups of the 80s era where every enemy bullet could see you spiraling out of control towards your doom.
